sections.heading: 1. Cancellation by Guest
sections.content:
All cancellation requests must be submitted in writing to stay@seazen.es. The cancellation date is the date on which SeaZen receives written notice.

More than 42 days: Full refund of deposit
41-28 days: 75% of total rental fee refunded
27–14 days: 50% of total rental fee refunded
Less than 13 days: No refund

sections.heading: 2. Cancellation by SeaZen
sections.content: In the unlikely event that SeaZen must cancel a confirmed reservation, guests will receive a full refund of all amounts paid. SeaZen will make every effort to suggest alternative dates or another property.

sections.heading: 3. Force Majeure
sections.content: SeaZen shall not be liable for cancellations caused by events beyond its reasonable control, including natural disasters, governmental restrictions, or pandemic-related travel bans. In such cases, SeaZen will offer a credit or rescheduling wherever possible.

sections.heading: 4. Travel Insurance
sections.content: We strongly recommend that all guests purchase comprehensive travel insurance that covers cancellation, curtailment, and personal liability.

sections.heading: 5. Changes to Booking
sections.content: Date changes are subject to availability and must be requested in writing. A €75 amendment fee applies. Changes within 28 days of arrival are treated as a cancellation and re-booking.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.content: For cancellations or amendments, please contact us at stay@seazen.es or whatsapp on +34 604 243 746.
